• 2D multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated maps and real-time multiplayer via MQTT
  • Features vehicle upgrades, resource management, building, and exploration mechanics
  • Cross-platform support with mobile controls, chat system, and extensive UI overlays
  • Save system with cloud synchronization and texture customization capabilities
    const GameEngine = class { update() { /* movement, mining, networking */ } draw() { /* rendering pipeline */ } }
    const NetworkManager = class { connect() { /* MQTT setup */ } handleMessage() { /* message routing */ } }

Mega Miner NG is a browser-based multiplayer mining simulation featuring procedurally generated underground worlds, vehicle upgrades, and real-time networking. Players can mine resources, build structures, trade with others, and explore vast cave systems while managing fuel, hull integrity, and cargo capacity. The game includes comprehensive save systems, cloud synchronization, and cross-platform mobile support.
